name: obsidian-plaud-importer
description: Import meeting summaries, transcripts, and attachments from Plaud.AI into an Obsidian vault.

scripts.lint: eslint main.ts plaud-client.ts plaud-client-re.ts import-modal.ts note-writer.ts debug-logger.ts __tests__/plaud-client-re.test.ts __tests__/import-modal.test.ts __tests__/note-writer.test.ts __tests__/debug-logger.test.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Charles Kelsoe (ckelsoe)
